text.title: business-model-research Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for business-model-research as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Assuming 20-30% take rate for a new marketplace.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Real successful marketplaces compress to 5-15% as suppliers gain leverage (Etsy 6.5%, Airbnb 14%, Upwork 10%). Agents assume high take rates because they pattern-match aspirational claims.

failure-mode.description: Using revenue as if it were profit in the Canvas Cost Structure block.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Gross margin must be sourced separately; AI-heavy products run 30-50% due to inference costs, not 80% SaaS folklore. Missing the Cost Structure block makes LTV:CAC unreliable.

failure-mode.description: Modeling freemium conversion at 15% without evidence.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Floor conversion is 2% (consumer) / 5% (B2B). Claims above these require an empirical citation or a Soft tag.
